ValidationRule.description: Blocks save when ApplicableFieldTypes__c is neither blank nor a semicolon list of known DisplayType names (STRING, TEXTAREA, URL, EMAIL, PHONE, ENCRYPTEDSTRING). Catches typos before they silently stop the rule firing.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Applicable Field Types must be blank (apply to every text-shaped field) or a semicolon list of: STRING, TEXTAREA, URL, EMAIL, PHONE, ENCRYPTEDSTRING. Example: STRING;TEXTAREA;ENCRYPTEDSTRING.
